mapper.select: select service_name, qdrant_status, qdrant_count, zoekt_status, updated_at from repo_index_status where service_name = #{serviceName}
select service_name, qdrant_status, qdrant_count, zoekt_status, updated_at from repo_index_status
mapper.insert: insert into repo_index_status (service_name, qdrant_status, qdrant_count, zoekt_status) values (#{serviceName}, #{qdrantStatus}, #{qdrantCount}, #{zoektStatus}) on duplicate key update qdrant_status = values(qdrant_status), qdrant_count = values(qdrant_count), zoekt_status = values(zoekt_status)
mapper.update: update repo_index_status set qdrant_status = #{qdrantStatus}, qdrant_count = #{qdrantCount} where service_name = #{serviceName}
update repo_index_status set zoekt_status = #{zoektStatus} where service_name = #{serviceName}
